017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp.*;
020import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
021import org.apache.juneau.http.Content;
022import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
023
024/**
025 * Mixin interface that exposes an MCP JSON-RPC endpoint at {@code POST /mcp} on any Juneau REST resource.
026 *
027 * <p>
028 * Implementing classes provide their {@link McpServerConfig} by implementing {@link #getMcpConfig()}; the
029 * default {@link #handleMcpRequest(JsonRpcRequest, RestRequest)} method dispatches incoming requests through
030 * {@link Mcp#handle(JsonRpcRequest, McpServerConfig, BeanStore)}.
031 *
032 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
033 * <pre>
034 * @Rest(path="/api")
035 * public class MyResource extends BasicRestServlet implements McpEndpoint {
036 *     @Override
037 *     public McpServerConfig getMcpConfig() {
038 *         return new McpServerConfig().addTool(new MyEchoTool());
039 *     }
040 * }
041 * </pre>
042 */
043public interface McpEndpoint {
044
045   /**
046    * Returns the {@link McpServerConfig} backing this endpoint.
047    *
048    * @return The config. Never {@code null}.
049    */
050   McpServerConfig getMcpConfig();
051
052   /**
053    * Default MCP JSON-RPC endpoint handler.
054    *
055    * <p>
056    * Implementations may override this method to customize routing (path / annotations) but must still
057    * call {@link Mcp#handle(JsonRpcRequest, McpServerConfig, BeanStore)} to dispatch.
058    *
059    * @param req JSON-RPC request envelope.
060    * @param restReq The current REST request.
061    * @return The response, or {@code null} for notifications.
062    */
063   @SuppressWarnings({
064      "resource" // Request-scoped scratch BasicBeanStore; lifetime is bounded by this handler invocation, no foreign resources are captured.
065   })
066   @RestPost(path = "/mcp")
067   default JsonRpcResponse handleMcpRequest(@Content JsonRpcRequest req, RestRequest restReq) {
068      var bs = new BasicBeanStore(restReq.getContext().getBeanStore())
069         .addBean(RestRequest.class, restReq);
070      return Mcp.handle(req, getMcpConfig(), bs);
071   }
072}
